content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad selloff across Nifty (-1.37%), IT -5.38%, VIX spiking to 19.67 (+5.81%). Defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma) holding up. Book is 68% deployed with net -0.15% P&L; priority is position management, not adding risk. With VIX spiking and IT cratering, new entries should be minimal and high-conviction only.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down 5.8% but CMP 76.94 still comfortably above SL 74.50. Strong Q4 fundamentals (PAT +27% YoY, GNPA 1.45%) intact. PSU Bank cohort weak today but thesis not broken. Hold with existing SL; day 0 so not appropriate to tighten yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +4.8% — SL already at 1011.65 which is above entry 984 (locked-in gain). No change needed to SL/target values so this is actually a HOLD. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 0.9%, within noise. Safe-haven ETF, defensive anchor in a VIX-spike environment. SL 119 provides adequate cushion. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high, FMCG defensive outperforming. Tightening SL from 1400 to 1405 (just below entry 1412.94) to reduce downside while giving room for volatility. Strong Q4 (+27% PAT, +22.6% revenue) supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "At 52-week high 1054.60; position only +0.3% so breakeven-trail is aggressive. Nudging SL from 1045 up to 1048 (just below entry 1049.05) to reduce downside. April 27 board meeting is binary event risk — this tightens without exiting."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Slightly positive. April 29 board meeting is a binary event with USFDA warning-letter overhang. SL 672 is tight — 1.3% below entry — appropriate given event risk. Hold but be ready to exit pre-event if setup deteriorates."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.8% on Nestle read-through fade. SL 2260 still ~2% below CMP 2304. Q4 results April 30. Thesis intact (rural recovery + FMCG defensive). Hold with current SL — still within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.1%, SL 393 intact (~1.8% below CMP). May 15 Q4 catalyst ahead with Rs 5-6 dividend expected. Power sector strong. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within SL tolerance; do not exit at session-low panic. Thesis (record Q4, dividend catalyst) intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry locking gains; current 1011.65 is appropriate for the +4.8% move. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor; VIX spike supports gold thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten to just below entry, reducing downside on a defensive held at 52wk high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "Nudge SL up ahead of April 27 binary earnings event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL appropriately tight into April 29 binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2260 still within risk budget; April 30 earnings catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small unrealized loss; SL intact; May 15 results catalyst ahead."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ONESOURCE (+3.8%, Ozempic tentative approval) and PNBHOUSING are genuine bullish setups but cluster/sector caps already pressuring. HSCL extended +6.5% intraday — fade risk into April 27 results. EMCURE boycott overhang is negative. IPCALAB, NMDC, BRITANNIA are watchable but setup not compelling today given VIX spike and 68% deployment. OFSS IT divergence noteworthy but IT sector carnage too risky. Will reassess tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed, close to max threshold. Cash INR 324k. Per deployment-hysteresis rule, default for new entries is NO_ACTION unless setup materially better than held names — nothing clears that bar today. VIX +5.8% suggests defensive posture. Focus is trailing SLs on profitable/near-entry names (NESTLEIND, AUBANK) to compress tail risk. Multiple binary earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — need to reassess SL tightening daily."
}
